---
title: "CanvasXpress Demo"
author: "Isaac Neuhaus"
date: "06/04/2024"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: yes
    theme: cerulean
    smart: no
    self_contained: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(reticulate)
py_install("pandas")
py_install("canvasxpress[all]")
```


```{python}
import pandas as pd

mpg = pd.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sidsriv/Introduction-to-Data-Science-in-python/master/mpg.csv", index_col=0)
```


```{python}
from canvasxpress.canvas import CanvasXpress
from canvasxpress.plot import graph

graph(
    CanvasXpress(
        data=mpg,
        config={
            "graphType": "Scatter2D",
            "xAxis": ["displ"],
            "yAxis": ["hwy"],
            "isDataFrame": True
        },
        width=609,
        height=609
    )
)
```
